name: seniority_too_high
prompt: Does this role clearly target senior, staff, lead, principal, architect, manager, or otherwise advanced-level software engineers?

name: experience_too_high
prompt: Does this role clearly require more than 4 years of professional software engineering experience?

name: frontend_primary
prompt: Is this role primarily focused on frontend development such as React, UI work, styling, design systems, or client-side web development?

name: non_remote_or_relocation_required
prompt: Does this role clearly appear to be on-site, hybrid, location-bound, or require relocation rather than being fully remote within the United States?

name: contract_only
prompt: Is this role clearly contract-only, temporary, freelance, or otherwise not a full-time permanent position?

name: junior_or_entry_level
prompt: Is this clearly a junior, entry-level, associate, new grad, or Software Engineer I role, or otherwise obviously targeted at early-career candidates?

name: attainable_generalist_role
prompt: Even if not explicitly labeled junior, does this role appear realistically attainable for an early-career software engineer based on its responsibilities and requirements?

name: backend_primary
prompt: Is this role primarily focused on backend development, APIs, services, databases, business logic, integrations, or server-side systems?

name: full_stack_penalty
prompt: Is this role clearly full-stack with meaningful frontend responsibilities, even if it is not primarily frontend?

name: python_bonus
prompt: Does this role explicitly use, require, or prefer Python?

name: remote_confirmed
prompt: Does this posting clearly indicate that the role is fully remote within the United States?

name: full_time_confirmed
prompt: Does this posting clearly indicate that the role is a full-time position?
